programmes.show_description: Joining Radio 5 Live.
Martin Geissler and the team bring you thoughtful conversation and expert analysis covering the most interesting news stories in Scotland.
A celebration of Easter Day with The Very Rev John Conway of St Mary's Episcopal Cathedral, Edinburgh.
Two hours of music and conversation with a faith and ethical perspective. Taking the week's events to ask what they say about our values and beliefs.
News, discussion and interviews from politics and beyond.
The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.
Sportsound brings you all the action from the first of Sunday's Scottish Premiership matches which sees Hearts travel to bottom side Livingston.
Sunday's Scottish Premiership football action continues on Sportsound with Dundee hosting Celtic.
An Easter-themed programme featuring Fanny Mendelssohn's Easter Sonata, sacred choral music by Byrd and Tikey Zes, and Mahler's Resurrection Symphony.
Settle in as Roddy Hart plays handpicked tracks, breakthrough artists and fresh sounds to close out your Easter Sunday.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
Celebrating over 40 years as a live performer, singer-songwriter Eddi Reader shares stories and memories from her musical life.
News from across Scotland and the world, plus sport, weather, entertainment and big name interviews.
Connie McLaughlin gets to the heart of the stories making the news.
News updates from Scotland and beyond, plus all your lunchtime sport, travel and weather.
Michelle McManus brings you feel-good music and chat with celebrity guests.
Len Pennie keeps you up to date on what's happening in the arts and culture scene across Scotland.
Breaking down the day's talking points with comment and opinion, plus sport, travel and weather.

programmes.show_name: Get It On with Bryan Burnett
programmes.show_description: What songs did you love to hear on a car journey? Was everyone singing We Are Family or maybe the roads were Long and Winding? Let us know your car journey classics.
A playlist filled with bangers from last year's Triple A's, featuring big tunes from Supergrass, Stevie Wonder and Kelis.
The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.
